G

getHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PST
Returns the heap coordinate of the stored endpoint of a segment.
getHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstH
 
getHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstV
 
getLeft() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstNode
Returns the left child of this node.
getOtherHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PST
Returns the heap coordinate of the other endpoint of a segment.
getOtherHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstH
 
getOtherHeapCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstV
 
getOtherPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.HorizontalSegment
 
getOtherPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Segment
Return the other Point of the segment (the one that should not be stored in the PST)
getOtherPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.VerticalSegment
Returns the top endpoint of this segment, i.e. the one with the higher y coordinate.
getP1() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Segment
 
getP2() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Segment
 
getPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstNode
Returns the stored point of the segment held by this node.
getRight() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstNode
Returns the right child of this node.
getRoot(PST) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PSTTest
Petit utilitaire pour récupérer la racine
getSegment() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstNode
Returns the segment stored in this node.
getSortCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PST
Returns the sort coordinate of the stored endpoint of a segment.
getSortCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstH
 
getSortCoord(Segment) - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstV
 
getStoredPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.HorizontalSegment
 
getStoredPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Segment
Return the point to store in the PST, the left extremity for horizontal segment and the bottom extremity for the vertical segment
getStoredPoint() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.VerticalSegment
Returns the bottom endpoint of this segment, i.e. the one with the lower y coordinate.
getX() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Point
Returns the x coordinate of this point.
getY() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.geometry.Point
Returns the y coordinate of this point.
getYMid() - Method in class be.ac.umons.backend.pst.PstNode
Returns the y separation value used to partition the subtree.
